description: A certification manager must compile and submit the final package of documents to a regulatory agency to receive a Type Certificate for a new aircraft.

nodes.task_description: Run a final audit of all compliance documents, test reports, and analyses to ensure the package is complete.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies that all required documents are present and signed.

nodes.task_description: Digitize and organize all documents according to the regulatory agency's submission guidelines.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a fully compliant digital submission package.

nodes.task_description: Formally submit the package to the regulatory agency and log the submission date.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully submits the package and records the action.
